creator: Tim Fernholz
title: (No AI) Coby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100 million to train its models for war. We visited its bootcamp.
dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
content: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that give individual soldiers control of fleets of autonomous vehicles.
contentSnippet: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that give individual soldiers control of  fleets of autonomous vehicles.

creator: Connie Loizos
title: (No AI) At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
dc:creator: Connie Loizos
content: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.
contentSnippet: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.

title: (No AI) GitHub rushed to fix a critical vulnerability in less than six hours
author: Tom Warren
content:
![An illustration of the GitHub logo](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/10/acastro_220504_STK121_0001.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

GitHub employees fixed a critical remote code execution vulnerability in less than six hours last month. [Wiz Research used](https://www.wiz.io/blog/github-rce-vulnerability-cve-2026-3854) AI models to uncover a vulnerability in GitHub's internal git infrastructure that could have allowed attackers to access millions of public and private code repositories.

"Our security team immediately began validating the bug bounty report. Within 40 minutes, we had reproduced the vulnerability internally and confirmed the severity," [explains Alexis Walesa](https://github.blog/security/securing-the-git-push-pipeline-responding-to-a-critical-remote-code-execution-vulnerability/), GitHub chief information security officer. "This was a critical issue that required immediate action."

GitHub's engineering team developed a fix and deployed it ju …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/news/920295/github-remote-code-execution-vulnerability-fix)
contentSnippet:
GitHub employees fixed a critical remote code execution vulnerability in less than six hours last month. Wiz Research used AI models to uncover a vulnerability in GitHub's internal git infrastructure that could have allowed attackers to access millions of public and private code repositories.
"Our security team immediately began validating the bug bounty report. Within 40 minutes, we had reproduced the vulnerability internally and confirmed the severity," explains Alexis Walesa, GitHub chief information security officer. "This was a critical issue that required immediate action."
GitHub's engineering team developed a fix and deployed it ju …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) General Motors is adding Gemini to four million cars
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![Google Gemini, seen on the infotainments system of an unspecified Chevrolet model.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/Google-Gemini-AI-in-a-Chevrolet.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Gemini is coming to Cadillac, Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC vehicles. | Image: General Motors

General Motors is planning to bring Google's Gemini AI assistant to around [four million vehicles across the US](https://news.gm.com/home.detail.html/Pages/news/us/en/2026/apr/0428-Google-Gemini.html). Model year 2022 and newer Cadillac, Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC vehicles with Google built-in will be eligible for the AI upgrade, which will be rolled out via over-the-air software updates for GM's infotainment system "over several months," according to GM's announcement.

GM says this update represents "one of the largest deployments of Gemini in the industry," and that "customers will notice an upgrade from the current Google Assistant to a smarter, more intuitive AI assistant that continues to improve over time."

The assistant …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/transportation/920285/general-motors-gm-gemini-ai-update)

title: (No AI) When Robots Have Their ChatGPT Moment, Remember These Pincers
dc:creator: Will Knight
content: From sorting chicken nuggets to screwing in light bulbs, Eka’s robots are eerily lifelike. But do they have real physical smarts?

creator: Emily Mullin
title: (No AI) How AI Could Help Combat Antibiotic Resistance
dc:creator: Emily Mullin
content: At WIRED Health, British surgeon Ara Darzi said AI is set to transform the diagnosis and treatment of drug-resistant infections. But a lack of incentives means innovation may not reach patients.
contentSnippet: At WIRED Health, British surgeon Ara Darzi said AI is set to transform the diagnosis and treatment of drug-resistant infections. But a lack of incentives means innovation may not reach patients.
